# One Song Foundation
## Scholarship Award Letter

---

**Date:** [MM/DD/YYYY]

**To:** [Recipient Full Name]

**Re:** One Song Foundation Scholarship Award

---

Dear [First Name],

We are pleased to inform you that your application for a One Song Foundation scholarship has been approved. We are honored to support your recovery journey.

---

| | |
|---|---|
| **Award Amount** | $X,XXX.XX |
| **Treatment Provider** | [Provider/Program Name] |
| **Award ID** | OSF-2026-XXX |

---

## What This Award Covers

This scholarship award covers the following treatment services at [Provider Name]:

- [Service 1, e.g., "Residential treatment program"]
- [Service 2, e.g., "Therapy sessions"]
- [Additional services as applicable]

---

## How Payment Works

Scholarship funds will be paid **directly to [Provider Name]** on your behalf. You will not receive funds directly. This ensures that the award is used for its intended purpose: supporting your treatment and recovery.

Payment will be processed within [X] business days of [Provider Name] confirming your enrollment/admission.

---

## Terms and Conditions

Please be aware of the following conditions:

1. **Services Received Only:** This award covers only treatment services you actually receive. If you do not complete the full program, unused funds will be returned to One Song Foundation.

2. **Early Termination:** If you leave treatment early for any reason, the remaining scholarship funds will be returned to One Song Foundation.

3. **Direct Payment:** Funds are paid to the treatment provider, not to you as the recipient.

4. **Award Period:** This award is valid for services beginning on or before [date, e.g., 90 days from award date].

---

## Important Notice

**This award does not guarantee future funding.** Each scholarship application is reviewed individually, and approval of this award does not create an expectation of additional awards in the future.

---

## Questions?

If you have any questions about your award, please contact us at:

**Email:** info@onesongfoundation.org

---

We believe in your journey and are grateful to be a part of it. Wishing you strength and healing.

With warm regards,

**[Approver Name]**
